For Museum Educators & Tour Coordinators

Smoother tours. More confident docents.

TourSync gives every docent a live, personalized schedule, so tours stay on track, content stays consistent, and guides can focus on the students in front of them.

Sound familiar?

Late bus arrivals throw off the whole tour schedule before it even starts

Inconsistent content delivery from one docent to the next

New docents juggling content, timing, and "where am I supposed to be?"

Tours running long and creating bottlenecks for the groups behind them

Rotating multiple tours at once, knowing where to start and what comes next

How It Works
1
Configure before the tour
Set the tour type, start time, and any optional stops — it only takes a couple of minutes.
2
Get a live, stop-by-stop schedule
The app builds a full schedule with arrival and departure times for each gallery and highlights where you are as you go.
3
Access museum curated cue cards
Gallery specific prompts written by your educators, are always one tap away, so tours stay consistent.
4
Add personal stories & notes
Docents can write their own cue cards to capture personal anecdotes and signature stories, so they can add their own stories and style.
What your museum gets
✓
Consistent visitor experiences
Docents cover the right content at each stop.
✓
Confident, supported docents
Especially helpful for new docents learning the galleries.
✓
Smoother operations for educators
Fewer bottlenecks, fewer tours running long, and less scrambling when buses are late.
Built for your museum
Your Content

Each museum has its own gallery names, timings, and cue cards tailored to your collection.

Flexible Scheduling

Anchor to start or end time. Move bathroom breaks and special activities to wherever they fit that day.

Works Offline

Content is cached on the device, no Wi-Fi required during the tour.

Simple Setup

Docents activate once with a code. No accounts, no logins, just open the app and go.

iOS & Android

Works on the phones your docents already carry.

Always Current

Content refreshes automatically, so you can update cue cards or timings without touching the app.

See it in action

The live schedule screen shows every stop, end time, and duration — with cue card and notes icons right there. Docents always know exactly where they are and what's coming next.

"TourSync was built by a docent who lived these same challenges every week. It's not a generic scheduling tool, it's something built specifically for how museum tours actually run."

— Designed by a working museum docent
Ready to see it in action?
